# xui_inbound (Data Source)

Read a single inbound by id (`/panel/api/inbounds/get/:id`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "xui_inbound" "example" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Inbound id.

### Read-Only

- `enable` (Boolean)
- `json` (String) Full inbound object as JSON (for advanced fields).
- `listen` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `protocol` (String) Xray protocol (e.g. vless, vmess).
- `remark` (String)
- `settings` (String) Raw VLESS/Trojan/etc. `settings` JSON string from the panel.
- `sniffing` (String) Raw `sniffing` JSON string.
- `stream_settings` (String) Raw `streamSettings` JSON string.
